final_answer:
Mei Davis (80217) customer service interaction:

Mei: Hi. Need to return an office chair — came with broken pieces.
Agent: So sorry! Name and zip?
Mei: Mei Davis, 80217.
Agent: Found your order. Confirm the return?
Mei: Actually… let me rethink a bit.
Agent: Of course. Return or exchange?
Mei: Exchange. Same item please.
Agent: Done — exchanging for the same chair. Anything else?
Mei: No. Thanks.
